LEAF-G150-001.title: Re-read the frozen authorities and adjacent seam evidence
LEAF-G150-001.objective: Ground the successor pack in observed repo truth rather than chat-memory critiques.
LEAF-G150-001.workflow_intent_assertion: Planning-mode only; re-audits the closed seam tranche so the new pack can correct thin planning without rewriting historical execution.
inputs: forensic defect ledger from the successor audit
ordered_actions: Read the frozen authorities in repo-native order.
Re-read the closed Gate 141-149 planning artefacts and adjacent receipts that proved the thinness pattern.
Trace the current downstream workflow surfaces again so the new pack is tied to observed code paths.
Record the corrective-scope reasons in the Gate 150 receipt before any router state changes.
forbidden_actions: Do not relabel the historical Gate 141-149 pack as failed history.
Do not invent runtime architecture that is not present in the repo.
Do not create new governed vocabulary in Gate 150.
expected_evidence: Gate 150 receipt explains why a successor pack is required now.
adjacent seam evidence and workflow surfaces are named explicitly.
definition_of_done: the new pack rationale is grounded in observed repo artefacts only
the retained-versus-corrected boundary is written down before the quartet is authored
LEAF-G150-001.packaging_requirement: Fresh full-history zip required at operator handoff after the Gate 150 planning slice is green.

LEAF-G150-002.title: Write the corrective successor planning quartet and bounded gates
LEAF-G150-002.objective: Populate the active gates master, leaves ledger, execution log, and checklist from repo truth only.
LEAF-G150-002.workflow_intent_assertion: Creates the new active planning scaffolding that later execution must obey literally.
inputs: closed Gate 141-149 seam tranche as evidence
ordered_actions: Write the new active pack with all mandatory sections from the template law.
Bound the successor work into Gates 150-156 rather than collapsing thin work into a single vague bundle.
Ensure every future gate has a deterministic objective, exact surface list, and definition of done.
Ensure the leaves ledger carries explicit ordered actions, forbidden actions, validation commands, expected evidence, and definitions of done for every future leaf.
forbidden_actions: Do not leave placeholder fields or empty leaf bodies.
Do not compress distinct corrective subjects into one gate merely for convenience.
Do not omit the future anti-drift closeout gate.
expected_evidence: new active planning quartet exists
future Gates 151-156 are bounded and non-placeholder
Gate 150 receipt records the bootstrap decisions
definition_of_done: the new active pack is internally coherent
future leaves are materially more detailed than the thin Gate 146-149 leaves they replace as future authority
LEAF-G150-002.packaging_requirement: Fresh full-history zip required at operator handoff after Gate 150 router truth is green.

LEAF-G150-003.title: Route the repo truthfully to Gate 151 and harden planning guards
LEAF-G150-003.objective: Update the active router surfaces and planning tests so the new pack is the truthful active authority.
LEAF-G150-003.workflow_intent_assertion: Router-only and planning-guard work; no runtime behaviour changes are allowed.
vocabulary_terms_checked: latest closed pack retained as evidence
repo_surfaces: planning-governance tests that admit the new active pack state
ordered_actions: Move PLANS.md from no-active-pack state to the new active corrective successor pack.
Update the canonical gate map so Gate 150 is complete and Gate 151 is the current active gate.
Append a changelog entry for the planning activation.
Add or amend planning tests only where router truth or active-pack truth has changed.
forbidden_actions: Do not weaken historical tests merely to silence failures.
Do not leave the gate map, leaves ledger, and execution log out of sync.
Do not claim the new pack is closed.
expected_evidence: router, gate map, leaves ledger, and execution log all agree on Gate 151 active
new Gate 150 planning test passes
planning-governance tests touched for router truth remain green
definition_of_done: Gate 150 is complete and Gate 151 is active on the branch

LEAF-G150-003.packaging_requirement: Create a fresh full-history zip from the exact reported branch state before handing work back to the operator.

Record the authoritative owner, mutation point, and downstream readers for each field.
Separate authoritative surfaces from compatibility-only surfaces and mark each with retain, migrate, or defer status.
forbidden_actions: Do not stop at stage labels alone; record field-level truth.
Do not classify a compatibility surface as authoritative merely because many tests read it.
Do not invent consumers that are not present in the repo.

authoritative versus compatibility-only surfaces are distinguished explicitly.
definition_of_done: every affected downstream field has an ownership verdict

LEAF-G151-001.packaging_requirement: Fresh full-history zip required whenever this gate is reported back to the operator; Gate 156 additionally requires the final corrective pack handover zip.

Do not claim replay or legacy reconciliation without naming the exact consumer.
